summary: 2-Level Drill-Down Navigation in Info Ventas Tab - FULLY WORKING. Backend: 15/16 pytest tests passed (1 skipped due to external DB timeout). Frontend: All drill-down flows verified via Playwright. NEW endpoint /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion/orders returns orders grouped by order_id. Existing endpoint /api/comercial/orders/{order_id}/lines returns line details. Both backend and frontend integration working correctly.

minor.issue: Intermittent 520 timeout errors when querying large accounts (cuenta_id=8 has 41,125 orders). External DB/Cloudflare issue, not code bug.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span>. Does not affect functionality, console warning only.

server.py: Uses _CATALOG_JOIN/_CATALOG_FILTER constants to maintain product filtering consistency across all classification endpoints

context_for_next_testing_agent: 2-Level drill-down for Info Ventas tab verified. Backend endpoints: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion (returns rows by marca/tipo/entalle), GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion/orders (NEW - Level 1 orders by classification), GET /api/comercial/orders/{order_id}/lines (Level 2 line details). Frontend: ClasifDetailDrawer component in CuentaDetalle.jsx handles both levels. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_clasificacion_drilldown.py. Note: External Odoo DB queries can be slow (30-60s) for large accounts like cuenta_id=8 which has 41,125 orders.
